mapper.insert: insert into REVIEW( user_id, target_id, target_type, rating, content, create_time, state ) values( #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{targetType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{rating,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER} )
mapper.select: select * from REVIEW where target_id = #{targetId} and target_type = #{targetType} and state = 1 order by create_time desc
select * from REVIEW order by create_time desc
